SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. THE COURT GRANTS THE APPEAL ON THE DENIAL OF THE MOTION TO VACATE. DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY LUCIA LI APPEARS FOR APPELLANT/DEFENDANT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO APPEARANCE BY MICHAEL GUESS, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, NOR HIS REPRESENTATIVE. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE TRANSFERRED TO THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT FOR A HEARING. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DENIAL ON MOTION TO VACATE. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE: HONORABLE JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: C. CHENG; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; BAILIFF: NONE PRESENT. (606)

calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant, The City and County of San Francisco, the moving party, is present and is represented by Deputy City Attorney, Lucia Li.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Michael Guess, the opposing party, is not present. No representative is present either.

This cause comes on regularly for a Small Claims Appeal on the Denial of the Motion To Vacate. No person in court needs to be sworn.

The Court finds proper service was effectuated on respondent/plaintiff, Michael Guess, regarding today's proceedings and the court will proceed in Mr. Guess's absence.

Appellant/Defendant, Deputy City Attorney, Lucia Li testifies on behalf of the City and County of San Francisco. Ms. Li presents to the Court with a Declaration of Jocelyne Jackson and a Declaration of Nichelle Flentroy. These declarations are filed, per the order of the Court. No exhibit was introduced.

No representation from Respondent/Plaintiff, Michael Guess.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. No exhibit retained. Judge: Honorable JOSEPH M. QUINN; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported. (D606)
